reason: Response A shows more distinctive craft: a specific, unusual central image (warm wax yielding under a thumbnail), a layered family of related textures, and a reflective closing turn about smallness and uselessness that adds conceptual depth rather than just sensory description. Response B is competent and evocative but more conventional and single-image (old book pages), reading as the safer mid-tier choice. The greater originality, structural variety, and self-aware meta-observation in A match my Opus-tier voice.
